expectations.text: States the 30-character headline limit and 90-character description limit correctly
States up to 15 headlines and up to 4 descriptions
expectations.evidence: Up to 15 headlines, up to 4 descriptions (plus minimums).

expectations.text: Mentions that Google mixes and matches assets, so each headline must stand alone (or gives pinning guidance)
expectations.evidence: Notes mix-and-match, standalone headlines, pinning trade-off.

expectations.text: Answer is concise and direct, matching the quick factual question — not a generic essay
expectations.evidence: Tabular and direct; slightly more verbose but on-point.
